series_desc: We meet on the 19th of every month, all year long — a recurring community gathering for the African diaspora and allies in Barcelona. Each meetup builds toward our annual Juneteenth celebration on June 20.
next_event_where: Volta Bar · Hotel Borneta · Passeig de Picasso 26–30, El Born
next_event_desc: Join us for the monthly BJuneteenth community meet-up. BJuneteenth events are Juneteenth-inspired gatherings to share inspiration, connect with people from the African diaspora, and support collective liberation. They are also our steppingstones to this June's bigger Juneteenth Barcelona event. Entry is free — drinks and food are available to purchase from Volta Restaurant & Bar.
venue_desc: A cozy and intimate space lit by a skylight. Pull up a chair and relax with new friends over a glass of wine, or sit at the bar and watch the mixologists craft signature cocktails. Drinks and cuisine draw from the myriad flavors found on the Mediterranean coast.
venue_address: Passeig de Picasso, 26–30, Ciutat Vella, 08003 Barcelona
venue_finding: Enter via Hotel Borneta and head to the Volta bar — we'll be there.
series_band_sub: BJuneteenth Monthly meets on the 19th of every month — January through December. Join us each month as we build community and momentum toward Juneteenth Barcelona 2026 on June 20, and keep the gathering going all year.
